mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_insurance WHERE module_id = #{moduleId} AND module_type = #{moduleType}
mapper.update:
update t_insurance set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag},update_user_id = #{requestUsrId} where module_type = #{moduleType} AND module_id in
#{item}
mapper.select: select * from t_insurance where module_id = #{moduleId} and module_type = #{moduleType}

select * from t_insurance where module_type = #{moduleType} and module_id in
#{item}
